## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Arena.im to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and address brand confusion issues.](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Google is confusing Arena.im with a similar product (LM Arena), necessitating a comprehensive SEO and branding strategy](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Content strategy overhaul initiated, introducing 20 new topics focused on specific industries, platforms, and seasonal events](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [SEO performance for refreshed articles showing positive trends, with new batches being monitored closely](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Google's launch of a similar tool to Arena.im presents both challenges and opportunities for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

## Topics

### Brand Confusion and SEO Strategy

  - [Google confusing Arena.im with LM Arena, impacting search results and brand visibility](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Plan to develop comprehensive strategy beyond SEO, including PR and PPC](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - Action items:
      - [Create series of articles to differentiate Arena.im](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
      - [Audit and optimize meta titles/descriptions across website](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
      - [Develop actionable SEO strategy by next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### Content Strategy Overhaul

  - 20 new topics introduced, focusing on:
      - [Specific retail industries](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [Different platforms and verticals](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
      - [Seasonal content (holiday season, events)](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [18 articles ready for publishing (2 per day)](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Implementing human QA touch for improved quality](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=458.0)
  - [Third batch of refreshed articles in progress (5 selected from Arena's audit list)](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=495.0)

### SEO Performance Tracking

  - Two batches of refreshed articles being monitored:
      - [First batch (started Aug 22): Showing improvements in clicks, impressions, and positions](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Second batch (started last week): Too early for significant results](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [New articles from last week now indexed and starting to gain impressions](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=626.0)

### Google's Similar Product Launch

  - [Google introduced a tool similar to Arena.im, specifically for YouTube](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Presents both opportunities and challenges for Arena.im](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)
  - Content strategy:
      - [Create 1-5 articles addressing this development](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Highlight Arena's cross-platform capabilities (YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Focus on Arena's B2B strengths vs. Google's consumer-focused offering](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)

### Team Update

  - [Prateek Gupta introduced as new content expert supporting Andrej](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Brazil Environmental Update

  - [Rainfall improving air quality in southern Brazil](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
  - [Issues persist in about 40% of the country, including São Paulo](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=998.0)
  - [Importance of Amazon rainforest ("lungs of the world") emphasized](https://fathom.video/share/A49RzFGzrsDRsdru7zmtdcpfd7FuFwkJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)

## Next Steps

  - Andrej to paste 20 new content topics into Arena's Airtable
  - Develop and implement strategy to address brand confusion with LM Arena
  - Create content addressing Google's similar product launch
  - Continue monitoring SEO performance of refreshed and new articles
  - Implement seasonal content strategy focusing on e-commerce events (Black Friday, Cyber Monday)
  - Arena team to review suggested topics, especially seasonal content
